a.xlink:title: Queues a network request for a given URL and worker thread.
Returns cached redirect URL for the given original URL, if available.
Emitted when a request is added to the network queue.
Makes a network request for the given URL using the specified worker.
Processes all queued requests respecting the request quota.
Handles a finished network reply for the card image.
Emitted when a network request successfully completes.
Emitted when a network request completes successfully.
Emitted when a URL has been redirected.
Emitted when a cached URL is invalid and must be removed.
Called when all URLs have been exhausted or download failed.
Request that a URL be downloaded.
Attempts to read an image from a network reply.
